landing.title: Moral Intuition Test
landing.description: Step into the charity donation booth and explore how your moral intuitions shape your giving decisions.
landing.hint: Takes about 2 minutes — just go with your gut. 🧠

compassion.label: 🌿 Reflect
compassion.text:
Think back to a moment when your heart ached —
Maybe you witnessed someone in pain,
or came across an image that stayed with you.
Sit with that feeling for a moment.

gratitude.label: ☀️ Reflect
gratitude.text:
Think back to a moment when you felt deeply grateful —
Maybe someone came through for you,
or life offered you something truly precious.
Sit with that feeling for a moment.

moralDecision.title: Allocate Your $100 Donation
moralDecision.subtitle: Drag the slider to split your funds between the two organizations

debriefing.title: This Was a Psychology Experiment
debriefing.subtitle: Your donation decision may have been quietly shaped by your subconscious
debriefing.compassionDescription: The opening scenario was designed to evoke compassion, priming you to prioritize "Care" — reducing others' suffering.
debriefing.gratitudeDescription: The opening scenario was designed to evoke gratitude, priming you to prioritize "Fairness" — justice and equal rights.
debriefing.researchReference: Based on research by Goenka & van Osselaer (2019):

compassionFinding.title: Compassion
compassionFinding.description: → Tends to increase giving to care-oriented organizations

gratitudeFinding.title: Gratitude
gratitudeFinding.description: → Tends to increase giving to fairness-oriented organizations

debriefing.submitting: ⏳ Sending your response to the class dataset…
debriefing.submitted: ✅ Submitted! Check the screen for the class-wide results.
